title: Login Customizable Pop-up screen
excerpt: I would be great to have the option to create a Pop-up screen on login that all users see when they log-in.  Great way to drive some information home or start the day with a funny or informative statement/quote.

posts.author: canarini (RC)
posts.cookedHtml: I would be great to have the option to create a Pop-up screen on login that all users see when they log-in. Great way to drive some information home or start the day with a funny or informative statement/quote.
